title: Add official paint brand logos and apply black & gold theme with real contact details

requirements.text: Generate and display realistic, accurate logo images for all four authorized paint brands — Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Birla Opus Paints, and Dulux Paints — in the Partners section. Each logo should closely resemble the real brand identity (correct wordmark style, brand colours, and distinctive visual elements). Serve the logos as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in the Partners component.
acceptanceCriteria: Asian Paints logo image is displayed in the Partners section, visually resembling the real brand logo
Berger Paints logo image is displayed in the Partners section, visually resembling the real brand logo
Birla Opus Paints logo image is displayed in the Partners section, visually resembling the real brand logo
Dulux Paints logo image is displayed in the Partners section, visually resembling the real brand logo
All logo images are served from frontend/public/assets/generated
Each logo is clearly legible and presented with an 'Authorized Applicator' badge

requirements.text: Redesign the entire website colour scheme from navy blue/white to a black and gold combination. Update all CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and Tailwind config tokens to use deep black (e.g., #0A0A0A, #111111) as the primary background, rich gold/amber (e.g., #C9A84C, #D4AF37, #F0C040) as the accent colour, and off-white/cream (#F5F5F0) for text and light surfaces. Ensure every component — Navbar, Hero, Services, About, WhyChooseUs, Partners, Contact, Footer — consistently reflects the new black and gold palette, including backgrounds, text colours, button styles, card borders, icon fills, badge colours, and hover/focus states.

quotes: with black and golden color combo

acceptanceCriteria: All section backgrounds use deep black tones
All accent elements (buttons, badges, icons, highlights) use gold/amber tones
All body text uses off-white or cream for readability on dark backgrounds
Navbar reflects black background with gold accent CTA and links
Hero section uses black overlay with gold accents on headline and CTA
Services cards use black/dark card backgrounds with gold icon accents
WhyChooseUs stats and highlights use gold numbers/accents on dark background
Partners section uses dark card backgrounds with gold badge borders
Contact section form fields and buttons use black/gold styling
Footer uses deep black background with gold accent links

requirements.text: Update the Why Choose Us / Stats section to display 25 years of experience as the experience stat.
acceptanceCriteria: The experience stat in the WhyChooseUs/Stats section reads '25+' or '25 Years' of experience
The label clearly identifies it as years of experience

requirements.text: Add real contact details throughout the website. In the Contact section, About section, and Footer: display email yashwant.shinde.3262@gmail.com, mobile number 9822625581, and proprietor name Yashwant Shinde.

quotes: add email yashwant.shinde.3262@gmail.com mobile no :9822625581 and proprietor yashwant shinde

acceptanceCriteria: Email yashwant.shinde.3262@gmail.com is visible in the Contact section
Mobile number 9822625581 is visible in the Contact section
Proprietor name 'Yashwant Shinde' appears in the About section and/or Footer
Contact details are also present in the Footer
Email is rendered as a clickable mailto: link
Phone is rendered as a clickable tel: link

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
All generated logo images must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated — do not route through the backend
Backend (backend/main.mo) requires no changes for this request
nonGoals: Fetching or embedding real trademark-protected SVGs from external CDNs
Any backend data model or canister changes
Adding new page sections or navigation items beyond what already exists

required: Asian Paints brand logo with red and white colour scheme, circular logo mark with 'Asian Paints' wordmark in bold sans-serif (asian-paints-logo.dim_300x150.png)
Berger Paints brand logo with red diagonal stripe design and 'Berger Paints' wordmark in blue/red sans-serif (berger-paints-logo.dim_300x150.png)
Birla Opus Paints brand logo with geometric 'Opus' wordmark and Birla group branding in green and gold tones (birla-opus-logo.dim_300x150.png)
Dulux Paints brand logo with the distinctive rainbow arc/splash design and 'Dulux' wordmark in bold red lettering (dulux-paints-logo.dim_300x150.png)
